canonical_definition: A statistical validation protocol used to assess the generalization of an attack method's effectiveness by training on a subset of harmful query categories and testing on unseen categories.
papers: EFFICIENT JAILBREAK ATTACK SEQUENCES ON LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS VIA MULTI-ARMED BANDIT-BASED CONTEXT SWITCHING
Interpretable Vision-Language Survival Analysis with Ordinal Inductive Bias for Computational Pathology
